channel.title: Getting "Oops, something went wrong" error when trying to follow Tutorial
channel.description:
Hello,
I'm currently just simply trying to follow the instructions in https://tutorial.frontity.org/part1-creating-a-custom-theme/create-a-frontity-project to simply follow the demo. Unfortunately, I'm running into the error I mentioned in my title. Here's a screenshot of the message and my console:
![Screenshot 2023-01-19 at 4.04.50 PM|690x430](upload://5lEvtRaFa4YVo50L6LAisGhaZ1F.png)
It just says I have an "internal server error" and I'm not sure what could be causing it.
It looks like a few other people have ran into this recently: https://community.frontity.org/t/oops-something-went-wrong/3350/3. Could this be something new that's broken?
Thanks!

item.title: Getting "Oops, something went wrong" error when trying to follow Tutorial
item.dc:creator: amagee12
item.description:
Hello,

I’m currently just simply trying to follow the instructions in Create a Frontity Project - Frontity Tutorial to simply follow the demo. Unfortunately, I’m running into the error I mentioned in my title. Here’s a screenshot of the message and my console:

It just says I have an “internal server error” and I’m not sure what could be causing it.

It looks like a few other people have ran into this recently: Oops, something went wrong - #3 by eng.aminld. Could this be something new that’s broken?

Thanks!

Read full topic
item.source: Getting "Oops, something went wrong" error when trying to follow Tutorial
